assessment.note: Names a lack of substantive feedback on key decisions, which signals unsupported strain and mild disengagement; also reveals a clarity/support issue worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Key decisions feedback
new_queue.name: On those key decisions, what feedback are you not getting that would help most?
new_queue.description: Drills into the missing feedback Lin named so the manager can understand the specific support gap.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: What needs air cover
new_queue.name: What would you want more air cover on from me right now?
new_queue.description: Finds the manager support that would help pace normalize without adding vague support talk.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks steadier
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Ends by converting the conversation into a concrete ask or adjustment without opening a new thread.
